Ulcers Slough/Eschar on Admission Number CHAR 1 The number of unstageable pressure ulcers at discharge due to coverage of wound bed by slough and/or eschar that were present at admission.
213 UNSTGBL_PRSR_TISUE_STG_NUM UNSTGBL_PRSR_TISUE_STG_NUM M0300F3 Unstageable Pressure Ulcers Slough and/or Eschar Discharge Stageable on Admission Number CHAR 1 The number of unstageable pressure ulcers at discharge due to coverage of wound bed by slough and/or eschar that were stageable at admission.
